Meta.Title: 3 Day Business Trip in San Diego
Meta.Summary: Sample itinerary with Meta, Day, and POI nodes only.

POI.name: SAN Airport Arrival
POI.description: Flight lands at San Diego International Airport. Morning arrival to get the business trip started.

POI.name: Client Work Meeting
POI.description: Afternoon strategy and project alignment meeting at the downtown office.

Restaurant.name: Lou & Mickey's
Restaurant.description: Upscale steak and seafood dinner in the Gaslamp Quarter. Great atmosphere to unwind after a day of travel and meetings.

POI.name: Reading Cinemas Gaslamp
POI.description: Catching a late movie to relax for the rest of the evening. Located conveniently in the downtown area.

Restaurant.name: Breakfast Republic
Restaurant.description: Popular local breakfast spot known for creative pancakes and morning classics. Casual and energetic.

POI.name: Suit Shopping at Fashion Valley
POI.description: Trip to the Fashion Valley outdoor mall to get fitted for and purchase a new professional suit.

POI.name: Tavern+Bowl East Village
POI.description: Afternoon downtime rolling a few games at an upbeat downtown bowling alley.

POI.name: Embarcadero Harborfront Walk
POI.description: Relaxing stroll along the San Diego Bay waterfront. Views of the USS Midway and Coronado Bridge.
POI.highlights: Ocean breeze; Bay views; Relaxing atmosphere

Restaurant.name: Copa Vida
Restaurant.description: Quick artisanal coffee and breakfast sandwich before heading into the final meeting.

POI.name: Wrap-up Meeting
POI.description: Final morning meeting to secure next steps and project deliverables before flying out.

Restaurant.name: Puesto at the Headquarters
Restaurant.description: Award-winning artisanal tacos for a fast but memorable San Diego lunch before heading to the airport.

POI.name: SAN Departure
POI.description: Flight departure from San Diego International Airport. End of trip.
